style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow drifting mist particles that bend unnaturally around the body, casting distorted reflections in the air like shattered glass. Cold blue-white energy pulses shimmer through the skin, illuminating the environment with an eerie, ghostly luminescence that dims and brightens rhythmically. The lighting mood is a chilling, misty twilight with faint purple highlights, evoking a haunting sense of mystery. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
